theme_strategy.rationale: True dark mode mimics professional financial terminals, reduces eye strain for traders monitoring screens for hours, and allows semantic colors (red/green) and accents (amber/cyan) to pop.
theme_strategy.implementation: Force dark mode in tailwind classes. Avoid pure white text on pure black; use off-white for primary text.

headings.usage: Dashboard titles, panel headers, main section titles.

body.usage: General descriptive text, form labels, journal notes.

data_and_numbers.usage: CRITICAL: Must be used for ALL numerical data, tables, P&L, timestamps, ticker symbols, and metrics. This enforces the terminal aesthetic.

accents.usage: Use cyan for interactive element highlights (active tabs, borders). Use orange/amber for AI insights or critical warnings.

rules: No glassmorphism. Flat solid colors only.
No soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders to separate panels.
Sharp edges. Override Tailwind radius to `rounded-none` or `max 2px`.
Containers should feel like resizable, tightly packed terminal windows.

dashboard_grid.structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-px bg-border (to create 1px borders between all items)
dashboard_grid.spacing: Tight padding (p-4 or p-3). Maximum data density.
panels: Top-left: Core Portfolio Metrics (P&L, Win Rate).
Middle: Scalable Chart Area (Equity Curve/AI Analysis).
Bottom/Right: Dense tabular trade list & recent activity.

navigation.style: Left sidebar or minimal top nav. Highly compact, icon + text.
navigation.active_state: Left border highlight (Cyan) or background tint.

components_instructions.tables: Must use monospaced font for all columns containing numbers. Right-align numerical columns. Extremely dense (py-1 or py-2 max). Include hover row states (`hover:bg-zinc-900`).
components_instructions.cards: Remove shadows (`shadow-none`). Force 1px solid border (`border border-zinc-800`). Background `bg-[#111]`. No rounded corners.
components_instructions.buttons: Sharp edges. Primary: Cyan text on very dark cyan bg (`bg-cyan-950 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-800`). Semantic: Green/Red for Buy/Sell.
components_instructions.inputs_and_forms: Solid black backgrounds (`bg-black`), sharp borders, monospaced placeholder text for tickers/prices.
components_instructions.tabs: Flat tab style. Active tab gets a bright Cyan top or bottom border. No pill shapes.
components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts. Strip out grid lines or make them extremely faint (`stroke-opacity 0.1`). Use Cyan for equity curves, Green/Red for volume/PnL bars.
components_instructions.toasts: Use Sonner. Dark mode forced. Sharp edges, positioned bottom-right.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Immediate and functional. No bouncy or slow animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Instant color swaps or sharp 1px border highlight.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Very fast (`duration-75` or `duration-100`). Limit to opacity and background color changes.

media_and_icons.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for a denser, more technical look. If unavailable, use `lucide-react` with 1.5px stroke width max.

images.description: Dark abstract geometric grid. Can be used at 5% opacity for empty states or login background to enforce the 'data grid' feel.

general_ui_ux_guidelines: One core question per view. Prioritize P&L and Win Rate at the top left.
Use progressive disclosure. Show summary metrics, allow clicking into a trade for full details.
Ensure contrast passes APCA standards, especially for Cyan and Amber against black.
Never use transparent backgrounds on dropdowns or overlays. Always use solid #111111.
DO NOT center align text globally. Keep text left-aligned, numbers right-aligned.
Use `data-testid` on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: IBM Plex Sans and JetBrains Mono.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to override `--radius: 0rem` to enforce sharp edges.
Use `recharts` for the Analytics dashboard and Equity Curve.
Build the Trade Entry Form using Shadcn primitives but restyle to eliminate rounding and shadows.
For the AI Insights Panel, use the Amber/Orange accent colors to differentiate it from standard data.
Ensure the application strictly follows the dark Bloomberg terminal aesthetic with a true black (`#0A0A0A`) background.
